_doc: Chrome locale catalog. Values are HTML-ESCAPED text exactly as it appears in the markup:
if a string contains & < > you MUST write the entity (& < >), e.g. "Mounts & Brackets".
Writing a literal & here produces broken markup, and the guard cannot catch it — so mind this when adding a language.
A key with a missing locale value is a GAP on purpose: the guard reports it. 'Not translated yet' is never silenced.
A homograph (correct translation happens to equal the English) gets an EXPLICIT value + reason here — NOT a locales.json whitelist entry.
Whitelisting would auto-pass every future language and silently inherit English; an explicit value makes the guard go red for the next language, forcing a real verdict.

header.industrial.reason: homograph — pt uses the identical word (confirmed: native /pt/industrial/ h1)

header.faq.reason: loanword — FAQ is standard in pt-BR (confirmed: native /pt/faq/ h1 + "Marca e Afiliação (FAQ)")

header.tejoy_premium_starlink_accessorie.en: Tejoy | Premium Starlink Accessories, Mounts & Power Solutions

footer.tejoy_starlink_accessories_limite.reason: fallback: brand / registered legal entity name

footer.address_no_62_baotian_1st_road_xi.en: Address:No. 62, Baotian 1st Road, Xixiang Street, Baoan District, Shenzhen, Guangdong Province, China
footer.address_no_62_baotian_1st_road_xi.pt-BR: Endereço: No. 62, Baotian 1st Road, Xixiang Street, Baoan District, Baoan, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China

footer.faq.reason: loanword — FAQ is standard in pt-BR (confirmed: native /pt/faq/ h1 + "Marca e Afiliação (FAQ)")

footer.copyright_2026_tejoy_starlink_acc.en:
Copyright  ©  2026 Tejoy Starlink Accessories Limited All Rights Reserved.
Tejoy manufactures third-party Starlink-compatible accessories. Not affiliated with SpaceX or Starlink.
footer.copyright_2026_tejoy_starlink_acc.pt-BR:
Copyright  ©  2026 Tejoy Starlink Accessories Limited. Todos os direitos reservados.
A Tejoy fabrica acessórios de terceiros compatíveis com Starlink. Não é afiliada à SpaceX nem à Starlink.

footer.xml.reason: fallback: format name / code value (sitemap link)

switcher.aria.to_en.reason: 约定 A：aria-label 用读者的语言（= 该页 <html lang>）。见 es-switcher-seed.migration.mjs

switcher.aria.to_pt.reason: 约定 A。en 值【替换】了原 header.ver_esta_p_gina_em_portugu_s 的葡语值 —— 实测 52/52 切换器链接无独立 lang，那个值在 en 页上正被英语语音引擎读

switcher.code.en.reason: 同形词：国际语言代码，三语同值。显式给值而非白名单 —— 白名单会自动放行未来每种语言

card.alt.suffix.reason: signed by the i18n window (pt source of truth), chrome-pt-decisions.md; used by R2 cardHtml

card.alt.category._note: 首页机型卡 alt 后缀。pt-BR 的值不是我造的:它已经手写在 pt/index.html 的 Mini/Standard 两张卡上,这里只是把它提上来当唯一真源。

card.lang_badge._note: pt 卡片指向 en 正文时的语言标注。多语言签的措辞:小写、不加括号、不喊叫 —— 「它是一句提示,不是一个警告。用户要的是知道,不是被劝退」。⚠️ 由 renderPage 按存在性【派生】,绝不写死:写死的话 Phase 3 译完后必须有人记得删,忘了就反向撒谎。en 侧永不出现(en 页在 en 里永远存在)。

meta.title.suffix.en: | Premium Starlink Accessories, Mounts & Power Solutions
meta.title.suffix.pt-BR: | Acessórios Premium para Starlink, Suportes e Soluções de Energia
meta.title.suffix.reason: brand suffix for the DERIVED meta_title (render.js metaTitleOf). Not stored per product: a derived value kept as data drifts the moment a title is edited, and the drift is silent — that is how a half-English/half-pt meta_title shipped. Adding a language = translate this one key, not 64 stored strings. pt value is the one the i18n window already used across the pt pages.
